notes: Three search piles in the garden: at the sundial (the inscription, the hour marker), at the north bench (a forgotten book, a park map), at the NE flowerbed (Frank's quiet kit of small tools).

the_bronze_inscription.label: The sundial's inscription
the_bronze_inscription.flavor: Latin. HORAS NON NUMERO NISI SERENAS — I count only the bright hours. Frank read it the first Wednesday in November.

the_noted_hour.label: The hour on the gnomon
the_noted_hour.flavor: By the shadow: 2:18 PM. The brass-line where the shadow falls is, today, where you expected.

an_old_brass_coin.label: A brass coin (1948)
an_old_brass_coin.flavor: In the dust at the foot of the sundial. Maybe a coin from the year the garden was dedicated. The face is worn smooth. The date is legible on the reverse.

a_forgotten_book.label: Someone's forgotten paperback
a_forgotten_book.flavor: Wuthering Heights. Penguin Classics. Bookmark at page 188. Set on the north bench Wednesday last and not, by anybody, retrieved.

effects.text: You move it to the bench's iron arm so it's visible. Maybe Thursday someone comes back for it.

the_park_map.label: The Solenade Garden park map (folded)
the_park_map.flavor: The brochure they print every spring with the bench numbers and the date-of-dedication for each tree. You picked one up in November but you have not, since then, needed to consult it.

a_single_lost_glove.label: A single child's glove
a_single_lost_glove.flavor: Knitted. Red. Lost in February probably; the cold weight has gone out of it. Set on the bench arm in April by somebody hoping the kid would come back. The kid did not.

the_small_pruning_shears.label: Pruning shears
the_small_pruning_shears.flavor: Frank's. He keeps them tucked under the NE flowerbed's lavender. Mr Bouchon has noticed; Mr Bouchon has not mentioned.

effects.text: Shears in hand. The pinch on the rose-head is the small ritual.

the_trowel.label: The trowel
the_trowel.flavor: Bouchon's, technically. Frank uses it when he weeds. It has Bouchon's initials in marker on the wooden handle: C.B.

a_rose_clipping_in_paper.label: A rose clipping in waxed paper
a_rose_clipping_in_paper.flavor: Wrapped by Bouchon Tuesday for Frank to take home. A small graft from the heritage variety in the SW bed.
